title: Is the claimant still working for the organisation or person you're making a claim against?
legend: Is the claimant still working for the organisation or person you're making a claim against?
optionText1: The claimant is still working for the respondent
optionText2: The claimant is working a notice period for the respondent
optionText3: The claimant is no longer working for the respondent

isStillWorking.required: Tell us if the claimant is still working for the organisation or person
